TestReport.title: TestReport
TestReport.description: Represents a single Transformer Turns Ratio (TTR) test report, including input parameters, calculated results, and pass/fail statuses for each phase.

id.description: Unique identifier for the TestReport entity.

testDate.description: The date and time when the TTR test was performed.

workOrderNo.description: The work order number associated with the test.

transformerIdentifier.description: An identifier for the transformer under test (e.g., serial number, asset tag).

operatorName.description: The name of the operator who conducted the test.

authorizedAuthority.description: The name of the authorized inspection authority.

kvaRating.description: The KVA rating of the transformer.

hvLineVoltage.description: The High Voltage (HV) line voltage input by the user for the test.

lvLineVoltage.description: The Low Voltage (LV) line voltage input by the user for the test.

vectorGroup.description: The selected vector group of the transformer (e.g., Dyn11, Dyn1, Dy0, Yy0).

totalTaps.description: The total number of tap positions.

initialMeasurements.description: The measured ratio values for each tap and phase.

creatorId.description: The UID of the user who created the report.

definition.description: Collection of all Transformer Turns Ratio (TTR) test reports.

params.name: testReportId
params.description: The unique identifier for a specific TestReport document.
